audit.title: Audit Report
audit.desc: The Pepe Wife smart contract has been fully audited by leading security firms to ensure the highest levels of safety and transparency for our community.

hero.desc: The most elegant, playful, and modern memecoin presale in the galaxy. Join the family and ride the wave of the ultimate queen.

buybox.title: Presale is LIVE!
buybox.desc: Secure your $PWIFE at the lowest price

tokenomics.title: Tokenomics
tokenomics.desc: This is a full-width image container. Your custom tokenomics graphic will fill this area perfectly without margins.
tokenomics.desc_detailed: Pepe Wife features a sustainable economic model designed for long-term growth and community rewards. Our zero-tax policy ensures maximum efficiency for traders.

faq.a1: Pepe Wife is an elegant and playful memecoin project built on the Solana blockchain, designed to bring a touch of sophistication to the meme ecosystem.
faq.q2: How can I join the presale?
faq.a2: You can join the presale by connecting your wallet to our official website and exchanging USDT for $PWIFE during the active presale stages.
faq.a3: Yes, our smart contract has been fully audited by leading security firms, and liquidity will be locked to ensure community safety.
faq.a4: PWIFE listing is planned for Phase 2 of our roadmap, starting with major decentralized exchanges (DEX) followed by centralized exchanges (CEX).

whybuy.desc: Pepe Wife isn't just another memecoin. It's a statement of elegance, power, and the evolution of the Pepe ecosystem. We've built a foundation designed for success and community wealth.
whybuy.reason1_desc: Elegant and professional design that stands out from typical memecoins.
whybuy.reason2_desc: Focused on long-term growth and a supportive environment for holders.
whybuy.reason3_desc: Fully audited smart contract with locked liquidity for total peace of mind.

whitepaper.title: Pepe Wife Whitepaper
whitepaper.desc: Dive deep into the technical architecture, tokenomics, and the grand vision of the Pepe Wife ecosystem. Our whitepaper outlines every step of our journey to becoming the ultimate queen of memecoins.
whitepaper.feat1_desc: Connecting the global meme community through a unified and elegant ecosystem built on Solana's lightning-fast network.
whitepaper.feat2_desc: Multi-layered security protocols and fully audited smart contracts ensuring total safety for all $PWIFE holders.
whitepaper.feat3_desc: A clear and ambitious path from presale to Tier 1 CEX listings and a thriving decentralized ecosystem.

risk.title: Risk Warning
risk.p1: Cryptocurrency investments carry high risk. Pepe Wife ($PWIFE) is a memecoin project created for entertainment and community purposes. There is no guarantee of profit, and you should never invest money you cannot afford to lose.
risk.p2: Please conduct your own thorough research before participating in the presale. The market for memecoins is highly volatile. By participating, you acknowledge the risks involved and agree that the project team is not liable for any financial losses.

footer.desc: The most elegant queen in the crypto space. Join the evolution and be part of the royal family.
footer.rights: © 2026 PEPE WIFE PROJECT. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
footer.built_with: BUILT WITH LOVE FOR THE CRYPTO QUEEN.
